nl_prompt: Who are our top 10 customers by lifetime revenue?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: What is the average days between order and shipment per product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.category,
    AVG(ld.delivery_date - o.ship_date) AS avg_days_between_order_and_shipment
FROM 
    orders o
JOIN 
    products p ON o.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN 
    logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
GROUP BY 
    p.category

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql: SELECT p.category FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'returned' GROUP BY p.category HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(o.id) > 0.1

nl_prompt: What is the revenue per customer segment?
generated_sql:

JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: Which sales rep closed the most orders?

nl_prompt: What is the monthly revenue trend for the last 12 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', orders.order_date) AS month,
    SUM(orders.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    orders
WHERE 
    orders.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', orders.order_date)
ORDER BY 
    month

nl_prompt: What percentage of revenue comes from our top 20 percent of customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(orders.line_value) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT orders.customer_id) AS total_customers,
    (SUM(orders.line_value) / COUNT(DISTINCT orders.customer_id)) * 100 AS revenue_percentage
FROM 
    orders
JOIN 
    customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id
WHERE 
    customers.segment IN (
        SELECT 
            customer_id
        FROM 
            (
                SELECT 
                    customer_id,
                    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(orders.line_value) DESC) as rank
                FROM 
                    orders
                GROUP BY 
                    customer_id
            ) ranked_customers
        WHERE 
            ranked_customers.rank <= 20
    )

nl_prompt: Which customers with active CRM deals had delivery issues?
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name, d.delivery_date, d.expected_date
FROM customers c
JOIN sf_accounts sa ON c.email = sa.email_address
JOIN sf_opportunities o ON sa.account_id = o.account_id
JOIN orders od ON c.id = od.customer_id
LEFT JOIN logistics_deliveries d ON od.shipping_id = d.shipping_ref
WHERE o.stage IN ('Closed Won', 'Prospecting') AND d.status_code IS NULL

WHERE logistics_deliveries.delivery_date > logistics_deliveries.expected_date

nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    sf_opportunities.stage AS DealStage,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN logistics_deliveries.status_code = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(logistics_deliveries.id) * 100 AS OnTimeDeliveryRate
FROM 
    logistics_deliveries
JOIN 
    orders ON logistics_deliveries.shipping_ref = orders.shipping_id
JOIN 
    sf_opportunities ON orders.order_date >= sf_opportunities.close_date AND orders.order_date < sf_opportunities.next_step
GROUP BY 
    DealStage

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT l.carrier_name, AVG(CASE WHEN o.status = 'shipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_rate
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries l ON o.shipping_id = l.shipping_ref
WHERE c.segment = 'top'
GROUP BY l.carrier_name
ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.name AS customer_name,
    SUM(od.line_value) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
    AVG(od.line_value) AS average_order_value,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN r.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS return_count,
    (SUM(od.line_value) - SUM(od.line_value * od.discount_pct)) AS net_revenue
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN 
    order_items od ON o.id = od.order_id
LEFT JOIN 
    returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
WHERE 
    c.segment IN ('Gold', 'Platinum') -- Adjust segment as needed
GROUP BY 
    c.name, c.email
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN c.segment = 'Enterprise' THEN o.line_value ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue,
       COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
       AVG(o.line_value) AS average_order_value,
       COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS customer_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(o.id) * 100 AS return_rate
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.
generated_sql:
SELECT o.id AS order_id, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS customer_name, r.rep_name AS sales_rep_name
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN sales_reps r ON o.sales_rep_id = r.id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM complaints com
    WHERE com.order_id = o.id AND com.complaint_type LIKE '%defect%'
)
